title: I Give and Teach from Full
subtitle: An energy statement for releasing the split between financial generosity with children and raising them with values
excerpt: A short energy statement for parents who fear that giving their children ease will undermine their character. The release names the belief that withholding builds resilience; the allow names the confident, clear generosity that teaches something different.
sourceNotes: Original energy statement written for homemade.education. The release-and-allow framework is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

content.text: A short energy statement for the parent who fears that financial generosity will do damage. The release names the old belief that hardship builds character; the allow names the more nuanced thing: that giving from full, with intention, teaches something different.
I am ready to release every belief that says withholding from my children builds their character better than giving with intention does. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.

I am ready to align with and allow the confident, clear generosity that gives from full and teaches at the same time, without guilt, without hedging, without importing scarcity I am working hard to leave behind. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Written for homemade.education. The release-and-allow structure is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
